pillars.name: The Daily Portrait
pillars.description: Stunning standalone animal art with style reference matching

pillars.name: Mood Pack
pillars.description: Emoji/sticker sets showing 9 expressive moods of a single animal breed in a 3x3 grid

pillars.name: Zodiac Portraits
pillars.description: 12 zodiac signs as artistic animal figures, each in a unique art style

pillars.name: Grumpy Cuties
pillars.description: Pixar/DreamWorks-style chunky 3D animals with attitude. Round, fluffy, grumpy expression, arms crossed, vivid colors on clean studio background. Grid format (4x3) or single character.
pillars.style_ref: Search Pinterest for 'cute grumpy 3D animals Pixar style'

pillars.name: Felt Friends
pillars.description: Needle-felted/wool stop-motion style animals (Aardman Animations aesthetic). Woolly texture, glossy eyes, felt backgrounds, tiny knitted accessories. Heartwarming and cozy.
pillars.style_ref: Search Pinterest for 'needle felted animal art wool puppet'

pillars.name: Living Portraits
pillars.description: Short animated videos (5-10 sec) of animals in various animation styles

caption_structure: HOOK (1 sentence) → CONTEXT (1-2 sentences) → ENGAGEMENT PROMPT (question/CTA)
